methodology: Bugs counted from all synced tickets by created_at month. Bug = Asana Type or AI category classified as bug. Pre-AI = Dec 2025 through Apr 2026 (5 calendar months). Post-AI = May 2026 through report date.

post_ai.label: May 2026 – Jul 2026 (after AI)
post_ai.partial_month_note: Jul 2026 is partial (8 bugs in 4 days) — excluded from primary avg.

comparison.verdict: Average bugs created per month is 21.1% higher after AI adoption (50.8/mo pre-AI vs 61.5/mo post-AI full months). This is correlational — more delivery volume also increased post-AI. June 2026 had 74 bugs — the highest single month in the window.

narrative_summary: Largest cluster: "Invoice Number Not Generated" (18 bugs) — Number / sequence / auto-ID generation.
Most affected areas: Reports (20), Multiple Modules (17), Job Card (11).
91 of 123 bugs were high or critical priority.
